---
title: "slip_swyc"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-03"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
Ideas
- get an average swyc score per participant and correlate with 4 global phenotypes + meanthickness + total SA + domain-based CMD & calculate 4 global phenotypes CMD
- try to figure out how to get a "trajectory" per participant

# Controls
```{r setup, echo = TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
save_figs = TRUE
save_tables = TRUE
save_processed = TRUE
```

# Load packages
```{r}
#Load packages. Install these packages with install.packages("pkg_name") if they are not installed.
library(bigrquery) #package to import SQL tables into R
library(tidyverse) #package suite for data manipulation, reading data into R, and plotting (ggplot2)
library(glue) #package to use expressions with strings
library(ggseg)
require(gridExtra)
library(interactions)
library(boot)
library(parameters)

panel_save <- function(plot, filename, extension, folder){
  save_name <- paste0(folder, filename, ".", extension)
  ggsave(save_name, plot = plot, dpi = 300)
}
```

# Define paths
```{r}
save_path <-  "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/swyc_results/"
if(!dir.exists(save_path)) dir.create(save_path)

plot_output_folder <- paste0(save_path, "plots/")
if(!dir.exists(plot_output_folder)) dir.create(plot_output_folder)

csv_tables_folder <-  paste0(save_path, "processed_tables/")
if (!dir.exists(csv_tables_folder)) dir.create(csv_tables_folder)

csv_output_folder <-  paste0(save_path, "results_csv/")
if (!dir.exists(csv_output_folder)) dir.create(csv_output_folder)

betas_folder <- paste0(csv_output_folder, "full_betas/")
if (!dir.exists(betas_folder)) dir.create(betas_folder)

dkt_folder <- paste0(csv_output_folder, "dkt_betas/")
if (!dir.exists(dkt_folder)) dir.create(dkt_folder)
```

# Load SWYC and participants table from Arcus
```{r}
bq_auth()
#proj_id <- if (exists('proj_id')) proj_id else bq_projects()[1]
proj_id = "scit605-healthymri-2d73d69f"

#Download SWYC table
query <- glue("SELECT * FROM `lab.swyc_normative_scores_2026-04-13`") #the string here is the SQL query
swyc <- bq_project_query(proj_id, query) %>% bq_table_download(., page_size=3500) #assign the name of the dataframe in R here
print(paste0("Arcus lab.SWYC table, dimensions: ", dim(swyc))) #pastes the dimensions of the table downloaded

#Download Participants table
query <- glue("SELECT * FROM arcus.patient") #the string here is the SQL query
participants <- bq_project_query(proj_id, query) %>% bq_table_download(., page_size=3500) #assign the name of the dataframe in R here
print(paste0("Arcus arcus.patient table, dimensions: ", dim(participants))) #pastes the dimensions of the table downloaded
```

# SWYC Date Range
need to pull this value from arcus at some point
```{r}

```
# Load vars names
```{r}
vars_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_brain_vars/"
full_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"all_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
global_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"global_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
vol_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"vol_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
sa_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"sa_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"th_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars_median <- paste0(th_vars, ".median")
```

# Load centiles
```{r}
centiles_distinct_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_centiles_processed_tables/centiles_distinct_2026-03-18.csv"
centiles_distinct <- read.csv(centiles_distinct_path)

centiles_all_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_centiles_processed_tables/centiles_all_2026-03-18.csv"
centiles_all <- read.csv(centiles_all_path)

#lmsz_ga_centiles_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_centiles_processed_tables/lmsz_adjusted_centiles_ga.csv"
#lmsz_ga_centiles <- read.csv(lmsz_GA_centiles_path) %>% select(participant_id, session_id, sex, adjusted_age_in_days, age_at_scan, all_of(full_vars), grep("lmsz", names(.))) %>% mutate(lmsz_subset = "GA")

#lmsz_vpm_centiles_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_centiles_processed_tables/lmsz_adjusted_centiles_vpm.csv"
#lmsz_vpm_centiles <- read.csv(lmsz_vpm_centiles_path) %>% select(participant_id, session_id, sex, age_days, age_at_scan, full_vars, #grep("lmsz", names(.))) %>% mutate(lmsz_subset = "VPM")

#lmsz_lpm_centiles_path <- "/mnt/arcus/lab/users/kafadare/slip_centiles_processed_tables/lmsz_adjusted_centiles_lpm.csv"
#lmsz_lpm_centiles <- read.csv(lmsz_lpm_centiles_path) %>% select(participant_id, session_id, sex, age_days, age_at_scan, full_vars, #grep("lmsz", names(.))) %>% mutate(lmsz_subset = "LPM")

#lmsz_centiles <- bind_rows(lmsz_vpm_centiles, lmsz_lpm_centiles)

#lmsz_centiles <- lmsz_ga_centiles

#rm(lmsz_vpm_centiles, lmsz_lpm_centiles, lmsz_GA_centiles)

centiles_distinct$pat_id <- sub("sub-", "", centiles_distinct$participant_id)
centiles_all$pat_id <- sub("sub-", "", centiles_all$participant_id)
centiles_distinct <- centiles_distinct %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years <= 21)
centiles_all <- centiles_all %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years <= 21)
```

# Set 0/1 centiles to min/max value to avoid Inf/-Inf
numbers from gamlssTools pkg
```{r}
complete_centile_vars <- c(full_vars, th_vars_median)

for (x in complete_centile_vars){
  centiles_all[centiles_all[,x] == 0 & !is.na(centiles_all[,x]), x] <- 0.0000000000000000000000001
  centiles_all[centiles_all[,x] == 1 & !is.na(centiles_all[,x]), x] <- 0.99999999999999994
}

for (x in complete_centile_vars){
  centiles_all[centiles_all[,x] == 0 & !is.na(centiles_all[,x]), x] <- 0.0000000000000000000000001
  centiles_all[centiles_all[,x] == 1 & !is.na(centiles_all[,x]), x] <- 0.99999999999999994
}
```

# Make a birth factors table from arcus.participants
```{r}
bf <- participants %>% select(pat_id, birth_weight_kg, birth_length_cm, gestational_age, gestational_age_num, sex, race, ethnicity) %>%
  rename(gestational_age_string = gestational_age)
# convert the string format to days
# Convert different gestational_age_string formats and convert to both 1) number of days AND 2) number of weeks (rounded up/down) AND 3) number of COMPLETED weeks to the best of our knowledge
data <- bf$gestational_age_string

data <- sub("\\s", "", data)
complete_weeks <- as.numeric(sub("^(.{2}).*", "\\1", data))
indices_plus <- grep("\\+", data)
indices_fraction <- grep("/", data)
indices_decimal <- grep("\\.", data)
days <- rep(NA, length(data))
days[!is.na(data)] <- 3 #add three days by default if no other information is encoded for days
days[indices_fraction] <- as.numeric(sub("^.*?(\\d{1}/\\d{1})$", "\\1", data[indices_fraction]) %>% sub("^([0-9]{1}).*", "\\1", .))
days[indices_plus] <- 3 # add three days if gestational age is entered as [week number]+ (like 40+ of 38+)
days[indices_decimal] <- round(as.numeric(sub("^.*?(\\.\\d+)$", "\\1", data[indices_decimal]))*7)

days_total <- complete_weeks*7 + days
weeks_rounded <- round(days_total/7)

bf$ga_complete_weeks <- complete_weeks
bf$ga_days_total <- days_total
bf$ga_weeks_rounded <- weeks_rounded

# QC BW and GA

# GA: remove anyone encoded as > 44*7 ga days or < 22 weeks (there is a single 43.5 weeker, I don't really want to remove this entry)
# BW: remove anyone with birthweight recorded as > 10kg and < 0.3kg
bf$ga_days_total_qc <- ifelse(bf$ga_days_total < 22*7 | bf$ga_days_total >= 44*7, NA, bf$ga_days_total)
sum(!is.na(bf$ga_days_total) & is.na(bf$ga_days_total_qc)) # 21 removed

bf$gestational_age_num_qc <- ifelse(bf$gestational_age_num < 22 | bf$gestational_age_num >= 44, NA, bf$gestational_age_num)
sum(!is.na(bf$gestational_age_num) & is.na(bf$gestational_age_num_qc)) # 29 removed

bf$birth_weight_kg_qc <- ifelse(bf$birth_weight_kg < 0.3 | bf$birth_weight_kg > 10, NA, bf$birth_weight_kg)
sum(!is.na(bf$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(bf$birth_weight_kg_qc)) # 86 removed
```

# Make swyc_clean df with one row per patient-form pair
```{r}
swyc$pat_form <- paste0(swyc$pat_id, swyc$form_friendly_name)

dup_df <- swyc %>%
  group_by(pat_form) %>%
  filter(n() > 1)

dup_df_summary <- dup_df %>%
  group_by(pat_form) %>%
  summarise(
    across(c(n_answers, effective_age, age_mo, norm_devo_quotient),
            ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
           .names = "sd_{.col}"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

median(dup_df_summary$sd_n_answers)
median(dup_df_summary$sd_effective_age)
median(dup_df_summary$sd_age_mo)
median(dup_df_summary$sd_norm_devo_quotient)

max(dup_df_summary$sd_n_answers)
max(dup_df_summary$sd_effective_age)
max(dup_df_summary$sd_age_mo)
max(dup_df_summary$sd_norm_devo_quotient)

swyc_clean <- swyc %>%
  group_by(pat_form) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = n_answers, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = effective_age, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  distinct(pat_form, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

# Merge swyc and birth factor tables
```{r}
swyc_clean <- merge(swyc_clean, bf, by = "pat_id",
                    all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
```

# Calculate prematurity adjusted DQ for SWYC
```{r}
bf_overlap <- bf[bf$pat_id %in% swyc$pat_id,]
median_ga <- median(bf_overlap$ga_days_total_qc, na.rm = TRUE)
median_ga_term <- median(pull(bf_overlap %>% filter(ga_complete_weeks >= 37) %>%
                           select(ga_days_total_qc)), na.rm = TRUE)
swyc_clean$ga_diff_termmedian <- median_ga_term - swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc

swyc_clean$ga_adj_effective_age <- swyc_clean$effective_age - swyc_clean$ga_diff_termmedian
swyc_clean$ga_adj_age_mo <- round(swyc_clean$ga_adj_effective_age/30.437)
#swyc_clean$ga_adj_age_mo <- floor(swyc_clean$ga_adj_effective_age/30.437)
plot(swyc_clean$age_mo, swyc_clean$ga_adj_age_mo)
swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient <- swyc_clean$norm_devo_age/swyc_clean$ga_adj_age_mo
swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round <- round(swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient, 5)
plot(swyc_clean$norm_devo_quotient , swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient)

# ggplot(swyc_clean %>% filter(ga_days_total_qc<=(32*7)), aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, color = ga_complete_weeks)) +
#   geom_point() +
#   labs(x = "OG DQ",
#        y = "GA-ADJ DQ",
#        title = "GA <= 32 weeks") +
#   theme_classic() +
#   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
#   geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B0B0B0")
# 
# 
# ggplot(swyc_clean %>% filter(ga_days_total_qc >= 37*7), aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, color = ga_complete_weeks)) +
#   geom_point() +
#   labs(x = "OG DQ",
#        y = "GA-ADJ DQ",
#        title = "GA >= 37 weeks") +
#   theme_classic() +
#   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
#   geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B0B0B0")
# 
# ggplot(swyc_clean, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, color = ga_complete_weeks)) +
#   geom_point() +
#   labs(x = "OG DQ",
#        y = "GA-ADJ DQ",
#        title = "All GA") +
#   theme_classic() +
#   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
#   geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B0B0B0")

#cor.test(swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient, swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc)
#cor.test(swyc_clean$norm_devo_quotient, swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc)

sum((swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc < median_ga_term) & (swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round < swyc_clean$norm_devo_quotient) & !is.na(swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc)) # should be 0

swyc_clean[(swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc < median_ga_term) & (swyc_clean$ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round < swyc_clean$norm_devo_quotient) & !is.na(swyc_clean$ga_days_total_qc), 
           c("ga_days_total_qc", "ga_complete_weeks", "ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient", "norm_devo_quotient", "ga_adj_age_mo", "age_mo", "norm_devo_age")]
```

# Create Swyc-Avg with median DQ for each subject
```{r}
swyc_avg <- swyc_clean %>%
  group_by(pat_id) %>%
  summarise(n_forms = n(),
    sex = first(sex),
    ga_complete_weeks = first(ga_complete_weeks),
    ga_days_total_qc   = first(ga_days_total_qc),
    birth_weight_kg_qc = first(birth_weight_kg_qc),
    birth_length_cm = first(birth_length_cm),
    all_2s_sum = sum(all_2s == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    all_0s_sum = sum(all_0s == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    final_swyc_age = max(effective_age, na.rm = TRUE),
    final_swyc_age_ga_adj = max(ga_adj_effective_age),
    median_dq = median(norm_devo_quotient, na.rm = TRUE), 
    ga_adj_median_dq = median(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

hist(swyc_avg$median_dq)
hist(swyc_avg$ga_adj_median_dq)
hist(swyc_avg$final_swyc_age/30.437)
```

# Merge with centiles

## Merge all swyc with all centiles
```{r}
sum(centiles_all$pat_id %in% swyc_clean$pat_id) #869
swyc_all_centiles <- merge(swyc_clean, centiles_all %>% select(c("pat_id", "session_id", "scan_id_mpr", "site", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent",
                                                                "adjusted_age_in_days", "adjusted_age_in_years", "median_euler_mean", "euler_mean_mpr",
                                                                "age_at_scan", "bweight_percentile", "preterm", complete_centile_vars)), 
                     by = "pat_id", all.x = FALSE, all.y = FALSE)

length(unique(swyc_all_centiles$pat_id))
length(unique(swyc_all_centiles$pat_form))
dim(swyc_all_centiles)
swyc_all_centiles$scan_swyc_age_diff_days <- swyc_all_centiles$age_at_scan - swyc_all_centiles$effective_age
swyc_all_centiles$scan_before_swyc <- swyc_all_centiles$age_at_scan < swyc_all_centiles$effective_age
sum(swyc_all_centiles$age_at_scan == swyc_all_centiles$effective_age) # 0 (none on the same day)
hist(swyc_all_centiles$scan_swyc_age_diff_days, breaks = 50)
# if limited scan within two years of swyc
sum(swyc_all_centiles$scan_swyc_age_diff_days <= (365.25*2)) # 1526 rows/2372 rows
# within each pat-form, choose scan closest to swyc
swyc_all_centiles <- swyc_all_centiles %>%
  group_by(pat_form) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = scan_swyc_age_diff_days, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()
hist(swyc_all_centiles$scan_swyc_age_diff_days, breaks = 50)
length(unique(swyc_all_centiles$pat_form))
dim(swyc_all_centiles)
```

## Merge swyc avg with distinct centiles
```{r}
sum(centiles_distinct$pat_id %in% swyc_clean$pat_id) #869
swyc_avg_centiles <- merge(swyc_avg, centiles_all %>% select(c("pat_id", "session_id", "scan_id_mpr", "site", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent",
                                                                "adjusted_age_in_days", "adjusted_age_in_years", "median_euler_mean", "euler_mean_mpr",
                                                                "age_at_scan", "bweight_percentile", "preterm", complete_centile_vars)), 
                     by = "pat_id", all.x = FALSE, all.y = FALSE)

length(unique(swyc_avg_centiles$pat_id))
swyc_avg_centiles$scan_swyc_age_diff_days <- swyc_avg_centiles$age_at_scan - swyc_avg_centiles$final_swyc_age
```



# Data Availability - all (1 scan per participant)

```{r}
#   geom_point(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
#   geom_line(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) +

```

## Assess # of repeated measures in SWYC
```{r}
# swyc_subset %>%
#   count(pat_id) %>%
#   count(n)
```

# Prep Data for Analysis

## zscore variables of interest
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# zscore swyc allforms birth factors and DQ
df.zscore.swyc.all <- swyc_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("ga_days_total_qc", "birth_weight_kg_qc", "effective_age", "ga_adj_effective_age", "norm_devo_quotient", "ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore.swyc.all$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.all$sex)
df.zscore.swyc.all$form_friendly_name <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.all$form_friendly_name)

# zscore swyc avg birth factors and DQ
df.zscore.swyc.avg <- swyc_avg %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("ga_days_total_qc", "birth_weight_kg_qc", "final_swyc_age", "final_swyc_age_ga_adj", "median_dq", "ga_adj_median_dq")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore.swyc.avg$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.avg$sex)

####

# zscore allforms centiles and other variables of interest
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent <- swyc_all_centiles %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(complete_centile_vars, "bweight_percentile")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("median_euler_mean", "euler_mean_mpr", "adjusted_age_in_days", "age_at_scan", "ga_days_total_qc", "birth_weight_kg_qc", "effective_age", "ga_adj_effective_age", "norm_devo_quotient", "ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient",
                         "median_euler_mean", "euler_mean_mpr")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$sex)
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$preterm <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$preterm)
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$form_friendly_name <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$form_friendly_name)

# zscore avg centiles and other variables of interest
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent <- swyc_avg_centiles %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(complete_centile_vars, "bweight_percentile")), qnorm)) %>%
 mutate(across(all_of(c("median_euler_mean", "euler_mean_mpr", "adjusted_age_in_days", "age_at_scan", "ga_days_total_qc", "birth_weight_kg_qc", "final_swyc_age", "final_swyc_age_ga_adj", "median_dq", "ga_adj_median_dq")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sex)
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$preterm <- as.factor(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$preterm)
```

## find Inf cells, make a table of N per phenotype, should be 0
```{r, echo = FALSE}
inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent[c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)


inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)
```

# CMDs

## Calculate CMDs
```{r}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent_swyc_all_cent)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df.zscore_swyc_all_cent$vol.cmd <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df.zscore_swyc_all_cent$sa.cmd <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df.zscore_swyc_all_cent$th.cmd <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore_swyc_all_cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df.zscore_swyc_all_cent$global.cmd <- global.md
```

## Test associations with CMDs (inc interactions with age)
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Exploratory
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)
lm_swyc_volcmd <- lm(vol.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swyc_volcmd)

lm_swycbyage_volcmd <- lm(vol.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swycbyage_volcmd)

cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)

lm_swyc_sacmd <- lm(sa.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swyc_sacmd)

lm_swycbyage_sacmd <- lm(sa.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swycbyage_sacmd)

cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)

lm_swyc_thcmd <- lm(th.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swyc_thcmd)

lm_swycbyage_thcmd <- lm(th.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swycbyage_thcmd)

cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)

lm_swyc_globalcmd <- lm(global.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swyc_globalcmd)

lm_swycbyage_globalcmd <- lm(global.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
summary(lm_swycbyage_globalcmd)
```

## CMD plots
```{r}
# Vol CMD
cor_volCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)
## plot
volCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
volCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_volCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(median_dq, vol.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",volCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", volCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Volume CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# SA CMD
cor_saCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)
## plot
saCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
saCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_saCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(median_dq, sa.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",saCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", saCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Surface Area CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# Thickness CMD
cor_thCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)
## plot
thCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
thCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_thCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(median_dq, th.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",thCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", thCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Cortical Thickness CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

#Global CMD
cor_globalCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$median_dq)
## plot
globalCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
globalCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_globalCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(median_dq, global.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",globalCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", globalCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Global CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
```


# SWYC ~ Birth Factors

## Regressions
```{r}
table(df.zscore.swyc.all$form_friendly_name)

ga_reg_table_swyc <- data.frame(
  model = "Gestational Age",
  swyc_type = rep(c("All-Forms", "Median", "Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30"),2),
  ga_adj = c(rep(TRUE, 8), rep(FALSE,8)),
  N = NA,
  beta = NA,
  p = NA,
  se = NA,
  sig = NA,
  color = NA
)

swyc_unadj_ga <- lm(median_dq ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg)
swyc_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_median_dq ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg)
ga_N_median <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg$ga_days_total_qc))

swyc.all_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc + form_friendly_name, data = df.zscore.swyc.all)
swyc.all_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc + form_friendly_name, data = df.zscore.swyc.all)
ga_N_allforms <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all$ga_days_total_qc))

swyc.6mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month"))
swyc.6mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month"))
ga_N_6mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

swyc.9mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month"))
swyc.9mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month"))
ga_N_9mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

swyc.15mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month"))
swyc.15mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month"))
ga_N_15mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

swyc.18mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month"))
swyc.18mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month"))
ga_N_18mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

swyc.24mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month"))
swyc.24mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month"))
ga_N_24mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

swyc.30mo_unadj_ga <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month"))
swyc.30mo_adj_ga <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ ga_days_total_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month"))
ga_N_30mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month") %>% select(ga_days_total_qc)))

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median", "N"] <- ga_N_median

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms", "N"] <- ga_N_allforms

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6", "N"] <- ga_N_6mo

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9", "N"] <- ga_N_9mo

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15", "N"] <- ga_N_15mo

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18", "N"] <- ga_N_18mo

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24", "N"] <- ga_N_24mo

ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,1]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,2]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & ga_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_ga)$coefficients[2,4]
ga_reg_table_swyc[ga_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30", "N"] <- ga_N_30mo

###

bw_reg_table_swyc <- data.frame(
  model = "Birth Weight",
  swyc_type = rep(c("All-Forms", "Median", "Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30"),2),
  ga_adj = c(rep(TRUE, 8), rep(FALSE,8)),
  N = NA,
  beta = NA,
  p = NA,
  se = NA,
  sig = NA,
  color = NA
)

swyc_unadj_bw <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg)
swyc_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg)
bw_N_median <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg$birth_weight_kg_qc))

swyc.all_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc + form_friendly_name, data = df.zscore.swyc.all)
swyc.all_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc + form_friendly_name, data = df.zscore.swyc.all)
bw_N_allforms <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all$birth_weight_kg_qc))

swyc.6mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month"))
swyc.6mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month"))
bw_N_6mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 06 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

swyc.9mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month"))
swyc.9mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month"))
bw_N_9mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 09 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

swyc.15mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month"))
swyc.15mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month"))
bw_N_15mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 15 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

swyc.18mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month"))
swyc.18mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month"))
bw_N_18mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 18 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

swyc.24mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month"))
swyc.24mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month"))
bw_N_24mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 24 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

swyc.30mo_unadj_bw <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                          filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month"))
swyc.30mo_adj_bw <- lm(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg_qc, data = df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month"))
bw_N_30mo <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.all %>%
                        filter(form_friendly_name == "SWYC : 30 Month") %>% select(birth_weight_kg_qc)))

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Median", "N"] <- bw_N_median

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.all_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.all_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "All-Forms", "N"] <- bw_N_allforms

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.6mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-6", "N"] <- bw_N_6mo

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.9mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-9", "N"] <- bw_N_9mo

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.15mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-15", "N"] <- bw_N_15mo

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.18mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-18", "N"] <- bw_N_18mo

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.24mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-24", "N"] <- bw_N_24mo

bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "beta"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,1]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "se"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,2]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == FALSE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_unadj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30" & bw_reg_table_swyc$ga_adj == TRUE, "p"] <- summary(swyc.30mo_adj_bw)$coefficients[2,4]
bw_reg_table_swyc[bw_reg_table_swyc$swyc_type == "Month-30", "N"] <- bw_N_30mo
```

### Visualization
```{r}
#  Combine and arrange by specific order of swyc types
bf_swyc_plot_df <- bind_rows(ga_reg_table_swyc, bw_reg_table_swyc) %>%
  mutate(swyc_type = factor(swyc_type, levels = c("All-Forms", "Median", "Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30"))) %>% arrange(swyc_type) %>%
  mutate(sig = p < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"),
         y_labels = paste(swyc_type, N, sep = ", N="))

#  Plot
(swyc_bf_all_plot <- ggplot(bf_swyc_plot_df %>% 
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("All-Forms")), 
                                aes(x = beta, y = model)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = ga_adj, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 16, "FALSE" = 17),
                       labels = c( "TRUE" = "GA-ADJ DQ",
                                   "FALSE" = "Original DQ")) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.5)) +
    #scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta for DQ Across All SWYC Forms") +
    ylab(""))

(swyc_bf_median_plot <- ggplot(bf_swyc_plot_df %>% 
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("Median")), 
                                aes(x = beta, y = model)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = ga_adj, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 16, "FALSE" = 17),
                       labels = c( "TRUE" = "GA-ADJ DQ",
                                   "FALSE" = "Original DQ")) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.5)) +
    #scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta for DQ Median in Each Subj") +
    ylab(""))


(swyc_bf_allforms_ga <- ggplot(bf_swyc_plot_df %>% 
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30") &
                                           model == "Gestational Age"), 
                                aes(x = beta, y =swyc_type)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = ga_adj, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 16, "FALSE" = 17),
                       labels = c( "TRUE" = "GA-ADJ DQ",
                                   "FALSE" = "Original DQ")) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.1, 0.5)) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels =
                       pull(bf_swyc_plot_df %>%
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30") &
                                           model == "Gestational Age" & ga_adj == TRUE) %>%
                       select(y_labels))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta DQ ~ GA, Across Forms > N = 100") +
    ylab(""))

(swyc_bf_allforms_bw <- ggplot(bf_swyc_plot_df %>% 
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30") &
                                           model == "Birth Weight"), 
                                aes(x = beta, y = swyc_type)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = ga_adj, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 16, "FALSE" = 17),
                       labels = c( "TRUE" = "GA-ADJ DQ",
                                   "FALSE" = "Original DQ")) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.1, 0.5)) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = 
                       pull(bf_swyc_plot_df %>% 
                                  filter(swyc_type %in% c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30") &
                                           model == "Birth Weight" & ga_adj == TRUE) %>%
                       select(y_labels))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta DQ ~ BW, Across Forms > N = 100") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_bf_all_plot, "swyc-bf-all", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(swyc_bf_median_plot, "swyc-bf-median", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(swyc_bf_allforms_ga, "swyc-bf-allforms-ga", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```


## Scatterplots (old)

### BW
```{r}
(swyc_bw_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = birth_weight_kg, y = median_dq)) +
  geom_point(color = "#9B7A8F", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#9B7A8F") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_bw_beta,3), "; p=", signif(swyc_bw_p,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Birth Weight (z-scored), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Median SWYC Score (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_bw_plot, "swyc_bw_all-available", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

#check interaction with age
lm_swyc_bwbyage <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg*effective_age, data = df.zscore)
lm_swyc_bwbyage_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_bwbyage)

bwbyage_interaction_plot <- interact_plot(lm_swyc_bwbyage, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab("SWYC") + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(lm_swyc_bwbyage_stats$coefficients[4,1], 3))))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage_interaction_plot, "swyc_bwbyage_interact_plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

### GA
```{r}
ga_N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc))
cor.test(df.zscore$ga_days_total_qc, df.zscore$median_dq)
lm_swyc_ga <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
lm_swyc_ga_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_ga)
swyc_ga_beta <- lm_swyc_ga_stats$coefficients[2,1]
swyc_ga_p <- lm_swyc_ga_stats$coefficients[2,4]

(swyc_ga_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = gestational_age, y = median_dq)) +
  geom_point(color = "#9B7A8F", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#9B7A8F") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_ga_beta,3), "; p=", signif(swyc_ga_p,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Gestational Age (z-scored), N = ", ga_N),
    y = "Median SWYC Score (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_ga_plot, "swyc_ga_all-available", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

#check interaction with age
lm_swyc_gabyage <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
lm_swyc_gabyage_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_gabyage)
gabyage_interaction_plot <- interact_plot(lm_swyc_gabyage, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab("SWYC") + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(lm_swyc_gabyage_stats$coefficients[4,1], 3))))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage_interaction_plot, "swyc_gabyage_interact_plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

# Global Variables

## Define global vars of interest
```{r, echo = TRUE}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness")
```

## SWYC ~ global without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

## SWYC ~ global with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

## SWYC ~ global with QC, SWYC X age interaction

### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq*df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_global$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_global$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

## GA without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

## GA with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

## BW without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg_qc)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

## BW with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg_qc + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

## Visualize/Figure Panel without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga_reg_table_global)
bw_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw_reg_table_global)
swyc_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(swyc_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga_reg_table_global <- ga_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw_reg_table_global <- bw_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birthweight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

swyc_reg_table_global <- swyc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "SWYC",
         beta = swyc_beta,
         se   = swyc_se,
         p_adj    = swyc_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- bind_rows(ga_reg_table_global, bw_reg_table_global, swyc_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_noqc_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birthweight" = 17, "SWYC" = 8),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.25, 0.35)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, without QC covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_betas_noqc_plot, "global-betas-noqc-gabwswyc", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```



## Visualize/Figure Panel with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga.qc_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga.qc_reg_table_global)
bw.qc_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw.qc_reg_table_global)
swyc.qc_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(swyc.qc_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga.qc_reg_table_global <- ga.qc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw.qc_reg_table_global <- bw.qc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birthweight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

swyc.qc_reg_table_global <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "SWYC",
         beta = swyc_beta,
         se   = swyc_se,
         p_adj    = swyc_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- bind_rows(ga.qc_reg_table_global, bw.qc_reg_table_global, swyc.qc_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_withqc_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birthweight" = 17, "SWYC" = 8),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.25, 0.35)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, with QC covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_betas_withqc_plot, "global-betas-withqc-gabwswyc", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```



## Individual Scatterplots for SWYC
```{r}
swyc_N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq) & !is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global_VentricleChoroidVol))

#Ventricles
swyc_vent_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_VentricleChoroidVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_vent_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_VentricleChoroidVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_vent_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = global_VentricleChoroidVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#7293b0", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#7293b0") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_vent_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_vent_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC Score (z-scored), N = ", swyc_N),
    y = "Ventricle Volume Centile (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_vent_plot, "swyc-ventricles-withqc", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

#Subcortical GMV
swyc_scgmv_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SubCortGrayVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_scgmv_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SubCortGrayVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_scgmv_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = global_SubCortGrayVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#c87a7a", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#c87a7a") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_scgmv_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_scgmv_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC Score (z-scored), N = ", swyc_N),
    y = "Subcortical Gray Volume Centile (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_scgmv_plot, "swyc-scgmv-withqc", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

#Cortical GMV
swyc_ctxgmv_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_CortexVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_ctxgmv_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_CortexVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_ctxgmv_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = global_CortexVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#c87a7a", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#c87a7a") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_ctxgmv_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_ctxgmv_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC ctxore (z-ctxored), N = ", swyc_N),
    y = "Cortical Gray Volume Centile (z-ctxored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_ctxgmv_plot, "swyc-ctxgmv-withqc", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}


```
# CMDs
## Calculate CMDs for swyc allforms df
```{r}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$vol.cmd <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$sa.cmd <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$th.cmd <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.all.cent$global.cmd <- global.md
```

## Calculate CMDs for swyc avg df
```{r}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$vol.cmd <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sa.cmd <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd <- global.md
```

## Test associations with CMDs (inc interactions with age)
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Exploratory
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$vol.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$vol.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$vol.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
lm_swyc_volcmd <- lm(vol.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swyc_volcmd)

lm_swycbyage_volcmd <- lm(vol.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swycbyage_volcmd)

cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sa.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sa.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sa.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)

lm_swyc_sacmd <- lm(sa.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swyc_sacmd)

lm_swycbyage_sacmd <- lm(sa.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swycbyage_sacmd)

cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)

lm_swyc_thcmd <- lm(th.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swyc_thcmd)

lm_swycbyage_thcmd <- lm(th.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swycbyage_thcmd)

cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)

lm_swyc_globalcmd <- lm(global.cmd ~ median_dq, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swyc_globalcmd)

lm_swycbyage_globalcmd <- lm(global.cmd ~ median_dq*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
summary(lm_swycbyage_globalcmd)
```
