## CMD plots
```{r}
# Vol CMD
cor_volCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$vol.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
## plot
volCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
volCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_volCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(median_dq, vol.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",volCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", volCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Volume CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# SA CMD
cor_saCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$sa.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
## plot
saCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
saCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_saCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(median_dq, sa.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",saCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", saCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Surface Area CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# Thickness CMD
cor_thCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$th.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
## plot
thCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
thCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_thCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(median_dq, th.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",thCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", thCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Cortical Thickness CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

#Global CMD
cor_globalCMD_swyc <- cor.test(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$global.cmd, df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq)
## plot
globalCMD_swyc_r <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc$estimate, 3)
globalCMD_swyc_p <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc$p.value, 3)

(cor_globalCMD_swyc_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(median_dq, global.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",globalCMD_swyc_r, "; p=", globalCMD_swyc_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC DQ, N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Global CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
```

# Regional Variables

## Set limits for ggseg visualization
```{r}
limits <- c(-0.3, 0.3)
low_color = "#4878CF"
mid_color = "white"
high_color = "#D65F5F"
```

## Volume with QC covar

### simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ median_dq + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_vol %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(swyc_vol), perl = TRUE)

swyc_vol$label <- rownames(swyc_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

swyc_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", swyc_vol$label[cols_edit])

swyc_vol_sig_MC <- swyc_vol %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_vol_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_vol
name <- "swyc_median_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(swyc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_vol_noplot <- swyc_vol_sig_MC[!(swyc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "Median SWYC Volume"))

(swyc_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Median SWYC Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_dkt_vol_plot, "swyc-median-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(swyc_aseg_vol_plot , "swyc-median-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_vol_sig_MC[order(swyc_vol_sig_MC$swyc_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Median SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq*df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_vol$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_vol$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

## Surface Area

###  simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ median_dq + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_sa %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_sa$label <- rownames(swyc_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

swyc_sa_sig_MC <- swyc_sa %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_sa_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_sa
name <- "swyc_median_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_sa_noplot <- swyc_sa_sig_MC[!(swyc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "Median SWYC Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_dkt_sa_plot, "swyc-median-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_sa_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_sa_sig_MC[order(swyc_sa_sig_MC$swyc_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_sa <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_sa[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_sa[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Median SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_sa[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq*df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
  
  
  full_age_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  full_age_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(full_age_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results full all sample (no other covariates): ", dim(full_age_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

## Thickness

###  simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ median_dq + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_th %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_th$label <- rownames(swyc_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

swyc_th_sig_MC <- swyc_th %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_th_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_th
name <- "swyc_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_th_noplot <- swyc_th_sig_MC[!(swyc_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "Median SWYC Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_dkt_th_plot, "swyc-median-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_th_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_th_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_th_sig_MC[order(abs(swyc_th_sig_MC$swyc_beta), decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_th <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  print(i)
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  print(pheno)
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_th)[i] <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_th[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent, aes(x = median_dq, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Median SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_th[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```



### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_dq*df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
  
  
  full_age_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall[, which(names(df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent_fullcentall$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  full_age_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(full_age_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results full all sample (no other covariates): ", dim(full_age_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

# Test Mediation

## Get all variable names 

## Brain covars with BW
```{r}
lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_thcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_subcort <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global_SubCortGrayVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_vent <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global_VentricleChoroidVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_allcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_thcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + th.cmd + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_subcort_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global_SubCortGrayVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_vent_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + global_VentricleChoroidVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_allcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bw_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ birth_weight_kg + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

#plot
mediation_swycbw <- data.frame(
  model = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler"),
  estimate = c(summary(lm_swyc_bw)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_vent)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"]),
  se = c(summary(lm_swyc_bw)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_vent)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bw_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = estimate - se,
    ymax = estimate + se
  )

beta_swyc_bw_nocov = mediation_swycbw[mediation_swycbw$model == "no covar", "estimate"]
sehigh_swyc_bw_nocov = mediation_swycbw[mediation_swycbw$model == "no covar", "ymax"]
selow_swyc_bw_nocov = mediation_swycbw[mediation_swycbw$model == "no covar", "ymin"]

ggplot(mediation_swycbw, aes(x = model, y = estimate)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = beta_swyc_bw_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#7A7A7A", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = sehigh_swyc_bw_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = selow_swyc_bw_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler")) +
  labs(y = "Beta Estimate with Std Error", x = "LM Model covariates", title = "SWYC-DQ ~ Birth Weight") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```

## Brain covars with BWp
```{r}
lm_swyc_bwp <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_subcort <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global_SubCortGrayVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_vent <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global_VentricleChoroidVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + th.cmd + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_subcort_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global_SubCortGrayVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_vent_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + global_VentricleChoroidVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_bwp_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ bweight_percentile + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

#plot
mediation_swycbwp <- data.frame(
  model = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler"),
  estimate = c(summary(lm_swyc_bwp)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_vent)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"]),
  se = c(summary(lm_swyc_bwp)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_vent)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_bwp_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = estimate - se,
    ymax = estimate + se
  )

beta_swyc_bwp_nocov = mediation_swycbwp[mediation_swycbwp$model == "no covar", "estimate"]
sehigh_swyc_bwp_nocov = mediation_swycbwp[mediation_swycbwp$model == "no covar", "ymax"]
selow_swyc_bwp_nocov = mediation_swycbwp[mediation_swycbwp$model == "no covar", "ymin"]

ggplot(mediation_swycbwp, aes(x = model, y = estimate)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = beta_swyc_bwp_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#7A7A7A", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = sehigh_swyc_bwp_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = selow_swyc_bwp_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler")) +
  labs(y = "Beta Estimate with Std Error", x = "LM Model covariates", title = "SWYC-DQ ~ Birth Weight Percentile") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```

## Brain covars with GA
```{r}
lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_thcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_subcort <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global_SubCortGrayVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_vent <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global_VentricleChoroidVol, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_allcmd <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_thcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + th.cmd + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_subcort_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global_SubCortGrayVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_vent_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + global_VentricleChoroidVol + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_allcmd_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + + global.cmd + vol.cmd + sa.cmd + th.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
lm_swyc_ga_euler <- lm(median_dq ~ gestational_age + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)

#plot
mediation_swycga <- data.frame(
  model = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler"),
  estimate = c(summary(lm_swyc_ga)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_vent)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_euler)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"]),
  se = c(summary(lm_swyc_ga)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_subcort)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_vent)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_allcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_thcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_subcort_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_vent_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_allcmd_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
               summary(lm_swyc_ga_euler)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = estimate - se,
    ymax = estimate + se
  )

beta_swyc_ga_nocov = mediation_swycga[mediation_swycga$model == "no covar", "estimate"]
sehigh_swyc_ga_nocov = mediation_swycga[mediation_swycga$model == "no covar", "ymax"]
selow_swyc_ga_nocov = mediation_swycga[mediation_swycga$model == "no covar", "ymin"]

ggplot(mediation_swycga, aes(x = model, y = estimate)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = beta_swyc_ga_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#7A7A7A", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = sehigh_swyc_ga_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = selow_swyc_ga_nocov, linetype = "dashed", color = "#BDBDBD", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("no covar", "global.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.vol", "vent.vol", "all.cmd", "global.cmd-euler", "th.cmd-euler", "subcort.vol-euler", "vent.vol-euler", "all.cmd-euler", "only euler")) +
  labs(y = "Beta Estimate with Std Error", x = "LM Model covariates", title = "SWYC-DQ ~ Gestational Age") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```

## Test via bootstrapping (code from Kevin)
He used it to test if the inclusion of the PFN decreased the effect of PRS_1 on p-factor
From rotation with Ran, who used lavaan to do mediation --- Kevin said maybe this is a more appropriate method

### Gestational Age
```{r}
bootga <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_ga, iterations = 100)
bootga$model <- "no_covar"

bootga_globalcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootga_globalcmd_euler$model <- "global.cmd_euler"
bootga_thcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_ga_thcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootga_thcmd_euler$model <- "th.cmd_euler"
bootga_subcort_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_ga_subcort_euler, iterations = 100)
bootga_subcort_euler$model <- "subcort_euler"
bootga_vent_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_ga_vent_euler, iterations = 100)
bootga_vent_euler$model <- "vent_euler"

t.test(bootga$ga_days_total_qc,bootga_thcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootga$ga_days_total_qc,bootga_globalcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootga$ga_days_total_qc,bootga_subcort_euler$ga_days_total_qc,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootga$ga_days_total_qc,bootga_vent_euler$ga_days_total_qc,paired=FALSE)

models_tested_ga <- list(global.cmd_euler = bootga_globalcmd_euler %>% select(gestational_age, model),
                        th.cmd_euler = bootga_thcmd_euler %>% select(gestational_age, model),
                        subcort_euler = bootga_subcort_euler %>% select(gestational_age, model),
                        vent_euler = bootga_vent_euler %>% select(gestational_age, model))

bootga_plot_df <- do.call(rbind,
  lapply(names(models_tested_ga), function(facet_name) {
    df <- models_tested_ga[[facet_name]]
    df <- rbind(df, bootga %>% select(gestational_age, model))
    df$facet <- facet_name
    df
    }))

ggplot(bootga_plot_df) +
  geom_density(aes(x = gestational_age, fill = model), alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta Estimates",
    y = "",
    title = "Bootstrap Betas, Gestational Age "
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Model",
    values = c("no_covar" = "#7A7A7A", 
               "global.cmd_euler" = "#D08C8A",
               "th.cmd_euler" = "#C9A87C",
               "subcort_euler" = "#A6C48A",
               "vent_euler" = "#90A0B5") ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_blank())

bootga_plot_summary_df <- rbind(do.call(rbind, models_tested_ga), bootga %>% select(gestational_age, model)) %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarize(ga_beta_mean = mean(gestational_age),
            ga_lower_CI = t.test(gestational_age)$conf.int[1],
            ga_upper_CI = t.test(gestational_age)$conf.int[2])

ggplot(bootga_plot_summary_df, aes(x = model, y = ga_beta_mean)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ga_lower_CI, ymax = ga_upper_CI), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("no_covar", "global.cmd_euler", "th.cmd_euler", "subcort_euler", "vent_euler")) +
  labs(y = "Bootstrap Beta Mean with 95% CI", x = "LM Model covariates", title = "SWYC-DQ ~ Gestational Age") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

hist(bootga$ga_days_total_qc)
mean(bootga$ga_days_total_qc)
median(bootga$ga_days_total_qc)

hist(bootga_globalcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc)
mean(bootga_globalcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc)
median(bootga_globalcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc)
shapiro.test(bootga_globalcmd_euler$ga_days_total_qc)
```

### Birth Weight
```{r}
bootbw <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bw, iterations = 100)
bootbw$model <- "no_covar"

bootbw_globalcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bw_globalcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbw_globalcmd_euler$model <- "global.cmd_euler"
bootbw_thcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bw_thcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbw_thcmd_euler$model <- "th.cmd_euler"
bootbw_subcort_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bw_subcort_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbw_subcort_euler$model <- "subcort_euler"
bootbw_vent_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bw_vent_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbw_vent_euler$model <- "vent_euler"

t.test(bootbw$birth_weight_kg,bootbw_thcmd_euler$birth_weight_kg,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbw$birth_weight_kg,bootbw_globalcmd_euler$birth_weight_kg,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbw$birth_weight_kg,bootbw_subcort_euler$birth_weight_kg,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbw$birth_weight_kg,bootbw_vent_euler$birth_weight_kg,paired=FALSE)

models_tested_bw <- list(global.cmd_euler = bootbw_globalcmd_euler %>% select(birth_weight_kg, model),
                        th.cmd_euler = bootbw_thcmd_euler %>% select(birth_weight_kg, model),
                        subcort_euler = bootbw_subcort_euler %>% select(birth_weight_kg, model),
                        vent_euler = bootbw_vent_euler %>% select(birth_weight_kg, model))

bootbw_plot_df <- do.call(rbind,
  lapply(names(models_tested_bw), function(facet_name) {
    df <- models_tested_bw[[facet_name]]
    df <- rbind(df, bootbw %>% select(birth_weight_kg, model))
    df$facet <- facet_name
    df
    }))

ggplot(bootbw_plot_df) +
  geom_density(aes(x = birth_weight_kg, fill = model), alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta Estimates",
    y = "",
    title = "Bootstrap Betas, Birth Weight "
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Model",
    values = c("no_covar" = "#7A7A7A", 
               "global.cmd_euler" = "#D08C8A",
               "th.cmd_euler" = "#C9A87C",
               "subcort_euler" = "#A6C48A",
               "vent_euler" = "#90A0B5") ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_blank())
```

### Birth Weight Percentile
```{r}
bootbwp <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bwp, iterations = 100)
bootbwp$model <- "no_covar"

bootbwp_globalcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bwp_globalcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbwp_globalcmd_euler$model <- "global.cmd_euler"
bootbwp_thcmd_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bwp_thcmd_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbwp_thcmd_euler$model <- "th.cmd_euler"
bootbwp_subcort_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bwp_subcort_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbwp_subcort_euler$model <- "subcort_euler"
bootbwp_vent_euler <- bootstrap_model(lm_swyc_bwp_vent_euler, iterations = 100)
bootbwp_vent_euler$model <- "vent_euler"

t.test(bootbwp$bweight_percentile,bootbwp_thcmd_euler$bweight_percentile,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbwp$bweight_percentile,bootbwp_globalcmd_euler$bweight_percentile,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbwp$bweight_percentile,bootbwp_subcort_euler$bweight_percentile,paired=FALSE)
t.test(bootbwp$bweight_percentile,bootbwp_vent_euler$bweight_percentile,paired=FALSE)

models_tested_bwp <- list(global.cmd_euler = bootbwp_globalcmd_euler %>% select(bweight_percentile, model),
                        th.cmd_euler = bootbwp_thcmd_euler %>% select(bweight_percentile, model),
                        subcort_euler = bootbwp_subcort_euler %>% select(bweight_percentile, model),
                        vent_euler = bootbwp_vent_euler %>% select(bweight_percentile, model))

bootbwp_plot_df <- do.call(rbind,
  lapply(names(models_tested_bwp), function(facet_name) {
    df <- models_tested_bwp[[facet_name]]
    df <- rbind(df, bootbwp %>% select(bweight_percentile, model))
    df$facet <- facet_name
    df
    }))

ggplot(bootbwp_plot_df) +
  geom_density(aes(x = bweight_percentile, fill = model), alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~facet) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta Estimates",
    y = "",
    title = "Bootstrap Betas, Birth Weight Percentile"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Model",
    values = c("no_covar" = "#7A7A7A", 
               "global.cmd_euler" = "#D08C8A",
               "th.cmd_euler" = "#C9A87C",
               "subcort_euler" = "#A6C48A",
               "vent_euler" = "#90A0B5") ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_blank())
```

## Test via partial R (code in python from Briana, translated to R) 
[need to check code]
```{r}
# y = standardized outcome
y <- scale(df[[feat]])[, 1]  # scale() returns a matrix; [,1] converts to vector

# full model
X_full <- as.data.frame(scale(df[predictors]))
X_full$const <- 1            # equivalent to sm.add_constant
model_full <- lm(y ~ . + 0, data = X_full)  # +0 because const column added manually

# reduced model (exclude target_cov)
reduced_predictors <- setdiff(predictors, target_cov)
X_reduced <- as.data.frame(scale(df[reduced_predictors]))
X_reduced$const <- 1
model_reduced <- lm(y ~ . + 0, data = X_reduced)

# compute partial r^2
model_red <- lm(median_dq ~ global.cmd + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore.swyc.avg.cent)
r2_full <- summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler)$r.squared
r2_red  <- summary(model_red)$r.squared
partial_r2 <- (r2_full - r2_red) / (1 - r2_red)

# sign from coefficient
sign_coef <- sign(coef(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler)["gestational_age"])
partial_r <- sign_coef * sqrt(abs(partial_r2))

r2_full <- summary(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd)$r.squared
r2_red  <- summary(lm_swyc_ga)$r.squared
partial_r2 <- (r2_full - r2_red) / (1 - r2_red)

# sign from coefficient
sign_coef <- sign(coef(lm_swyc_ga_globalcmd_euler)["global.cmd"])
partial_r <- sign_coef * sqrt(abs(partial_r2))
```
## Test mediation per swyc form (not median dq)

### Regressions for Global
```{r}
vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness") 
swyc_forms_totest <- c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30")

grid <- expand.grid(
  pheno = vars_totest,
  swyc_form = swyc_forms_totest,
  ga_adj = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df <- df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% 
  select(pat_id, ga_days_total_qc, birth_weight_kg_qc, vars_totest, 
         form_friendly_name, norm_devo_quotient, ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, 
         median_euler_mean, euler_mean_mpr,complete_centile_vars) %>%
  rename(swyc_form = form_friendly_name) %>%
  mutate(swyc_form = recode(swyc_form,
                      "SWYC : 04 Month" = "Month-4",
                      "SWYC : 06 Month" = "Month-6",
                      "SWYC : 09 Month" = "Month-9",
                      "SWYC : 12 Month" = "Month-12",
                      "SWYC : 15 Month" = "Month-15",
                      "SWYC : 18 Month" = "Month-18",
                      "SWYC : 24 Month" = "Month-24",
                      "SWYC : 30 Month" = "Month-30",
                      "SWYC : 36 Month" = "Month-36",
                      "SWYC : 48 Month" = "Month-48",
                      "SWYC : 60 Month" = "Month-60")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, norm_devo_quotient),
               names_to = "ga_adj",
               values_to = "dq") %>%
  mutate(ga_adj = grepl("ga_adj", ga_adj))
  
results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
  
  pheno_i <- grid$pheno[i]
  form_i  <- grid$swyc_form[i]
  ga_i    <- grid$ga_adj[i]
  
  df_sub <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(swyc_form == form_i, ga_adj == ga_i) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("dq", pheno_i, "median_euler_mean"))) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (nrow(df_sub) < 3) {
    return(data.frame(
      pheno = pheno_i,
      swyc_type = form_i,
      ga_adj = ga_i,
      N = nrow(df_sub),
      beta = NA,
      p = NA,
      se = NA
    ))
  }
  
  fit <- lm(reformulate(c(pheno_i, "median_euler_mean"), response = "dq"),
            data = df_sub)
  
  coef_tab <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  
  data.frame(
    pheno = pheno_i,
    swyc_form = form_i,
    ga_adj = ga_i,
    N = nrow(df_sub),
    beta = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Estimate"],
    p = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    se = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Std. Error"],
    p_adj_pheno = p.adjust(coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"], method = "bonferroni", n = length(vars_totest)),
    p_adj_phenoform = p.adjust(coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"], method = "bonferroni", n = length(vars_totest)*length(swyc_forms_totest))
  )
}))

# arrange by swyc form and add columns for plotting
results <- results %>%
  mutate(swyc_form = factor(swyc_form, levels = c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30"))) %>% arrange(swyc_form) %>%
  mutate(sig = p_adj_phenoform < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"),
         y_labels = paste(swyc_form, N, sep = ", N="))


(swyc_allforms_global_plot <- ggplot(results, aes(x = beta, y = swyc_form, 
                                                  color = ga_adj, alpha = p_adj_pheno <= 0.05)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se),
                 height = 0.2,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~pheno, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B0B0B0") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta DQ ~ Global Centiles, Across Forms > N = 40") +
    ylab(""))


# if(save_figs == TRUE){
# panel_save(swyc_bf_all_plot, "swyc-bf-all", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# panel_save(swyc_bf_median_plot, "swyc-bf-median", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# panel_save(swyc_bf_allforms_ga, "swyc-bf-allforms-ga", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# }
```

### Regressions for CMD
```{r}
vars_totest <- c("global.cmd", "vol.cmd", "sa.cmd", "th.cmd") 
swyc_forms_totest <- c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30")

cmd.grid <- expand.grid(
  pheno = vars_totest,
  swyc_form = swyc_forms_totest,
  ga_adj = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df <- df.zscore.swyc.all.cent %>% 
  select(pat_id, ga_days_total_qc, birth_weight_kg_qc, vars_totest, 
         form_friendly_name, norm_devo_quotient, ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, 
         median_euler_mean, euler_mean_mpr,complete_centile_vars,
         global.cmd, vol.cmd, sa.cmd, th.cmd) %>%
  rename(swyc_form = form_friendly_name) %>%
  mutate(swyc_form = recode(swyc_form,
                      "SWYC : 04 Month" = "Month-4",
                      "SWYC : 06 Month" = "Month-6",
                      "SWYC : 09 Month" = "Month-9",
                      "SWYC : 12 Month" = "Month-12",
                      "SWYC : 15 Month" = "Month-15",
                      "SWYC : 18 Month" = "Month-18",
                      "SWYC : 24 Month" = "Month-24",
                      "SWYC : 30 Month" = "Month-30",
                      "SWYC : 36 Month" = "Month-36",
                      "SWYC : 48 Month" = "Month-48",
                      "SWYC : 60 Month" = "Month-60")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ga_adj_norm_devo_quotient_round, norm_devo_quotient),
               names_to = "ga_adj",
               values_to = "dq") %>%
  mutate(ga_adj = grepl("ga_adj", ga_adj))
  
cmd.results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(cmd.grid)), function(i) {
  
  pheno_i <- cmd.grid$pheno[i]
  form_i  <- cmd.grid$swyc_form[i]
  ga_i    <- cmd.grid$ga_adj[i]
  
  df_sub <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(swyc_form == form_i, ga_adj == ga_i) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("dq", pheno_i, "median_euler_mean"))) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (nrow(df_sub) < 3) {
    return(data.frame(
      pheno = pheno_i,
      swyc_type = form_i,
      ga_adj = ga_i,
      N = nrow(df_sub),
      beta = NA,
      p = NA,
      se = NA
    ))
  }
  
  fit <- lm(reformulate(c(pheno_i, "median_euler_mean"), response = "dq"),
            data = df_sub)
  
  coef_tab <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  
  data.frame(
    pheno = pheno_i,
    swyc_form = form_i,
    ga_adj = ga_i,
    N = nrow(df_sub),
    beta = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Estimate"],
    p = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    se = coef_tab[pheno_i, "Std. Error"],
    p_adj_pheno = p.adjust(coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"], method = "bonferroni", n = length(vars_totest)),
    p_adj_phenoform = p.adjust(coef_tab[pheno_i, "Pr(>|t|)"], method = "bonferroni", n = length(vars_totest)*length(swyc_forms_totest))
  )
}))


# arrange by swyc form and add columns for plotting
cmd.results <- cmd.results %>%
  mutate(swyc_form = factor(swyc_form, levels = c("Month-6", "Month-9", "Month-15", "Month-18", "Month-24", "Month-30"))) %>% arrange(swyc_form) %>%
  mutate(sig = p_adj_phenoform < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"),
         y_labels = paste(swyc_form, pheno, ga_adj, N, sep = "_"))


(swyc_allforms_cmd_plot <- ggplot(cmd.results, aes(x = beta, y = swyc_form, 
                                                  color = ga_adj, alpha = p_adj_pheno <= 0.05)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = N),
          vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se),
                 height = 0.2,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~pheno, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B0B0B0") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.35, "TRUE" = 0.8),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "nonsig",
               "TRUE" = "p < 0.05"), 
    name = "Bonferroni corrected across phenotypes (N = 4)") +
  scale_color_manual( values = c("FALSE" = "#4F85B5", "TRUE" = "#B34F6B"),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "Original DQ",
               "TRUE" = "GA-ADJ DQ"), name = "DQ CALCULATION") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Std Beta DQ ~ CMDs, Across Forms > N = 40") +
    ylab(""))


# if(save_figs == TRUE){
# panel_save(swyc_bf_all_plot, "swyc-bf-all", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# panel_save(swyc_bf_median_plot, "swyc-bf-median", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# panel_save(swyc_bf_allforms_ga, "swyc-bf-allforms-ga", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
# }
```
# Data Availability - All (includes repeated scan measures) (repeat analyses in "temporally restricted" sample)

## First-Pass plots for scan-swyc timing
```{r}
centiles_all$participant_id_modified <- sub("sub-", "", centiles_all$participant_id)
swyc_subset_all <- swyc %>% filter(pat_id %in% centiles_all$participant_id_modified)
swyc_subset_all <- merge(swyc_subset_all, centiles_all %>% select(c("participant_id_modified", "age_at_scan", "gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg")), 
                     by.x = "pat_id", by.y = "participant_id_modified", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
swyc_subset_all$age_diff <- swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan - swyc_subset_all$effective_age

if (save_processed == TRUE){
  write.csv(swyc_subset_all, glue("{csv_tables_folder}swyc_overlap_centiles_all_2511_gabwinc.csv"))
}

hist(swyc_subset_all$age_diff)
summary(swyc_subset_all$age_diff)
sum(swyc_subset_all$age_diff <= 0)
(swyc_overlap_plot <- ggplot(swyc_subset_all, aes(y = pat_id, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  geom_point(data = swyc_subset_all %>% 
              filter(age_at_scan <= max(effective_age) | age_at_scan >= min(effective_age)), 
            aes(x = age_at_scan), color = "black", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank())) 

(swyc_overlap_scanb4swyc_plot <- ggplot(swyc_subset_all %>% filter(age_diff <= 0),  aes(y = pat_id, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = age_at_scan), color = "black", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank())) 
```

## Determine availability of SWYC based on scan date

### adjust age at scan and effective age (swyc) for GA and convert to months
```{r}
# adjust effective age and age at scan for prematurity
swyc_subset_all$effective_age_months <- swyc_subset_all$effective_age/30.437
swyc_subset_all$adj_effective_age_months <- ifelse(!is.na(swyc_subset_all$ga_days_total_qc),
                                                 swyc_subset_all$effective_age_months + swyc_subset_all$ga_days_total_qc/4.35,
                                                 swyc_subset_all$effective_age_months + 40/4.35)

swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan_months <- swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan/30.437
swyc_subset_all$adj_age_at_scan_months <- ifelse(!is.na(swyc_subset_all$ga_days_total_qc),
                                                 swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan_months + swyc_subset_all$ga_days_total_qc/4.35,
                                                 swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan_months + 40/4.35)

swyc_subset_all$age_diff_months <- swyc_subset_all$age_at_scan_months - swyc_subset_all$adj_effective_age_months
```

### swyc within 10% of scan in either direction
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_subset_all_matched <- swyc_subset_all %>% filter(abs(age_diff_months) < 0.1*age_at_scan_months)
length(unique(swyc_subset_all_matched$pat_id))
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched)

(swyc_all_matched_plot <- ggplot(swyc_subset_all_matched, aes(y = pat_id, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_age_at_scan_months), color = "black", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))
```



### scan before SWYC, take average of SWYCs
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_subset_all_matched2 <- swyc_subset_all %>% filter(age_diff_months < 0)
length(unique(swyc_subset_all_matched2$pat_id))
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched2)
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched2[duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched2) | duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched2, fromLast = TRUE), ])
swyc_subset_all_matched2 <- swyc_subset_all_matched2[!duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched2),]
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched2)


(swyc_all_matched2_plot <- ggplot(swyc_subset_all_matched2, aes(y = pat_id, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_age_at_scan_months), color = "black", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))

# take average of SWYCs
swyc_subset_matched2_avg <- swyc_subset_all_matched2 %>% 
  group_by(pat_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_dq = mean(norm_devo_quotient),
    median_dq = median(norm_devo_quotient)
  )
dim(swyc_subset_matched2_avg)
```

### scan closest to SWYC, remove if > 24 months, choose the earliest scan
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_subset_all_matched3 <- swyc_subset_all %>% 
  group_by(pat_id) %>%
  filter(age_diff_months == min(age_diff_months) & age_diff_months <= 24) %>%
  filter(age_at_scan == min(age_at_scan)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(pat_age = paste0(pat_id, effective_age)) %>%
  all(pat_age, .keep_all = TRUE)

length(unique(swyc_subset_all_matched3$pat_id))
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched3)
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched3[duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched3) | duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched3, fromLast = TRUE), ])
swyc_subset_all_matched3 <- swyc_subset_all_matched3[!duplicated(swyc_subset_all_matched3),]
dim(swyc_subset_all_matched3)

(swyc_all_matched3_plot <- ggplot(swyc_subset_all_matched3, aes(y = pat_id, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = adj_effective_age_months, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = adj_age_at_scan_months), color = "black", size = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))
hist(swyc_subset_all_matched3$age_diff_months)
```

# Repeat Analyses with Date-Matched Subset

## Prep Data for Analysis

### Merge swyc and centiles df
```{r}
swyc_subset_matched_merged <- merge(swyc_subset_all_matched3, centiles_all %>% select(all_of(c("participant_id_modified",
                                                                                                   "age_at_scan", "preterm",
                                                                        "birth_weight_kg", "bweight_percentile",
                                                                        "sex", "adjusted_age_in_days","median_euler_mean",
                                                                        full_vars))), 
                     by.x = c("pat_id", "age_at_scan"), by.y = c("participant_id_modified", "age_at_scan"), all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
```

### keep one row per participant id (for now)
```{r}
swyc_subset_matched_merged <- swyc_subset_matched_merged %>%
  all(pat_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

### zscore variables of interest
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# zscore centiles and other variables of interest
df_matched.zscore <- swyc_subset_matched_merged %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", "adjusted_age_in_days", 
                         "median_euler_mean", "norm_devo_quotient")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df_matched.zscore$sex <- as.factor(df_matched.zscore$sex)
df_matched.zscore$preterm <- as.factor(df_matched.zscore$preterm)
```

### find Inf cells, make a table of N per phenotype, then convert to NaN
```{r, echo = FALSE}
inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)
```

### set Inf cells to NaN
```{r, echo = FALSE}
df_matched.zscore <- df_matched.zscore %>% 
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")), ~ replace(., is.infinite(.), NaN)))
```

## Global variables

### Define global vars of interest
```{r, echo = TRUE}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness")
```

### SWYC ~ global without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_matched_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_matched_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_matched_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc_matched_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc_matched_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

### SWYC ~ global with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient + df_matched.zscore$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

### Visualize/Figure Panel without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
swyc_matched_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(swyc_matched_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
swyc_matched_reg_table_global <- swyc_matched_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "SWYC",
         beta = swyc_beta,
         se   = swyc_se,
         p_adj    = swyc_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- swyc_matched_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_noqc_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("SWYC" = 8),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.25, 0.35)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, without QC covar") +
    ylab(""))
```

### Visualize/Figure Panel with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
swyc.qc_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(swyc.qc_reg_table_global)

swyc.qc_reg_table_global <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "SWYC",
         beta = swyc_beta,
         se   = swyc_se,
         p_adj    = swyc_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_withqc_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("SWYC" = 8),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.25, 0.35)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, with QC covar") +
    ylab(""))
```

### Individual Scatterplots for SWYC
```{r}
swyc_matched_N <- sum(!is.na(df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient) & !is.na(df_matched.zscore$global_VentricleChoroidVol))

#Ventricles
swyc_matched_vent_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_VentricleChoroidVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_matched_vent_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_VentricleChoroidVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_matched_vent_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = global_VentricleChoroidVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#7293b0", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#7293b0") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_matched_vent_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_matched_vent_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC Score (z-scored), N = ", swyc_matched_N),
    y = "Ventricle Volume Centile (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

#Subcortical GMV
swyc_matched_scgmv_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SubCortGrayVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_matched_scgmv_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SubCortGrayVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_matched_scgmv_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = global_SubCortGrayVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#c87a7a", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#c87a7a") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_matched_scgmv_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_matched_scgmv_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC Score (z-scored), N = ", swyc_matched_N),
    y = "Subcortical Gray Volume Centile (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))


#Cortical GMV
swyc_matched_ctxgmv_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_CortexVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_matched_ctxgmv_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_CortexVol") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_matched_ctxgmv_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = global_CortexVol)) +
  geom_point(color = "#c87a7a", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#c87a7a") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_matched_ctxgmv_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_matched_ctxgmv_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC ctxore (z-ctxored), N = ", swyc_matched_N),
    y = "Cortical Gray Volume Centile (z-ctxored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

#Total Surface Area
swyc_matched_sa_beta <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SurfaceArea") %>% 
  select(swyc_beta) %>% pull(swyc_beta)
swyc_matched_sa_p_adj <- swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% 
  filter(phenotype == "global_SurfaceArea") %>% 
  select(swyc_p_adj) %>% pull(swyc_p_adj)
(swyc_matched_sa_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = global_SurfaceArea)) +
  geom_point(color = "#c87a7a", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#c87a7a") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 0.5, y = 3.2,
           label = paste0("std beta=", signif(swyc_matched_sa_beta,3), "; p-adj=", signif(swyc_matched_sa_p_adj,3))) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Median SWYC ctxore (z-scored), N = ", swyc_matched_N),
    y = "Total Surface Area Centile (z-scored)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
```

## CMDs

### Calculate CMDs
```{r}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(df_matched.zscore)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(df_matched.zscore))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df_matched.zscore$vol.cmd <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df_matched.zscore$sa.cmd <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df_matched.zscore$th.cmd <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df_matched.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df_matched.zscore$global.cmd <- global.md
```

### Cor.test CMDs
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Exploratory
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$vol.cmd, df_matched.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$vol.cmd, df_matched.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$vol.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)

cor.test(df_matched.zscore$sa.cmd, df_matched.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$sa.cmd, df_matched.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$sa.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)

cor.test(df_matched.zscore$th.cmd, df_matched.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$th.cmd, df_matched.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$th.cmd, df_matched.zscore$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$th.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)

cor.test(df_matched.zscore$global.cmd, df_matched.zscore$ga_days_total_qc)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$global.cmd, df_matched.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$global.cmd, df_matched.zscore$bweight_percentile)
cor.test(df_matched.zscore$global.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
```

### CMD plots
```{r}
# Vol CMD
cor_volCMD_swyc.matched <- cor.test(df_matched.zscore$vol.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
## plot
volCMD_swyc.matched_r <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc.matched$estimate, 3)
volCMD_swyc.matched_p <- signif(cor_volCMD_swyc.matched$p.value, 3)

(cor_volCMD_swyc.matched_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(norm_devo_quotient, vol.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",volCMD_swyc.matched_r, "; p=", volCMD_swyc.matched_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("SWYC DQ (age within 10% of scan), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Volume CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# SA CMD
cor_saCMD_swyc.matched <- cor.test(df_matched.zscore$sa.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
## plot
saCMD_swyc.matched_r <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc.matched$estimate, 3)
saCMD_swyc.matched_p <- signif(cor_saCMD_swyc.matched$p.value, 3)

(cor_saCMD_swyc.matched_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(norm_devo_quotient, sa.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",saCMD_swyc.matched_r, "; p=", saCMD_swyc.matched_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("SWYC DQ (age within 10% of scan), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Surface Area CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

# Thickness CMD
cor_thCMD_swyc.matched <- cor.test(df_matched.zscore$th.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
## plot
thCMD_swyc.matched_r <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc.matched$estimate, 3)
thCMD_swyc.matched_p <- signif(cor_thCMD_swyc.matched$p.value, 3)

(cor_thCMD_swyc.matched_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(norm_devo_quotient, th.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",thCMD_swyc.matched_r, "; p=", thCMD_swyc.matched_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("SWYC DQ (age within 10% of scan), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Cortical Thickness CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))

#Global CMD
cor_globalCMD_swyc.matched <- cor.test(df_matched.zscore$global.cmd, df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient)
## plot
globalCMD_swyc.matched_r <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc.matched$estimate, 3)
globalCMD_swyc.matched_p <- signif(cor_globalCMD_swyc.matched$p.value, 3)

(cor_globalCMD_swyc.matched_plot <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(norm_devo_quotient, global.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 2, y = 10,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",globalCMD_swyc.matched_r, "; p=", globalCMD_swyc.matched_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("SWYC DQ (age within 10% of scan), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Global CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
```

# Regional Variables

## Set limits for ggseg visualization
```{r}
limits <- c(-0.3, 0.3)
low_color = "#4878CF"
mid_color = "white"
high_color = "#D65F5F"
```

## Volume

### simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_matched_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ norm_devo_quotient, data = df_matched.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
```
