```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_matched_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_matched_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_matched_vol %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(swyc_matched_vol), perl = TRUE)

swyc_matched_vol$label <- rownames(swyc_matched_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

swyc_matched_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", swyc_matched_vol$label[cols_edit])

swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC <- swyc_matched_vol %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_matched_vol
name <- "swyc_matched_median_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_matched_vol_noplot <- swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC[!(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_matched_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "SWYC Volume"))

(swyc_matched_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "SWYC Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_matched_dkt_vol_plot, "swyc_matched_median-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(swyc_matched_aseg_vol_plot , "swyc_matched_median-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC[order(swyc_matched_vol_sig_MC$swyc_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_matched_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_matched_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_matched_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_matched_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient*df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days + df_matched.zscore$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_vol$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_vol$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
  
  
  full_age_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall[, which(names(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore_fullcentall$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  full_age_reg_table_vol$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(full_age_reg_table_vol$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results full all sample (no other covariates): ", dim(full_age_reg_table_vol %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

## Surface Area

###  simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_matched_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ norm_devo_quotient, data = df_matched.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_matched_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_matched_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_matched_sa %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_matched_sa$label <- rownames(swyc_matched_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC <- swyc_matched_sa %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_matched_sa
name <- "swyc_matched_median_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_matched_sa_noplot <- swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC[!(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_matched_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "SWYC Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_matched_dkt_sa_plot, "swyc_matched_median-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC[order(swyc_matched_sa_sig_MC$swyc_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_matched_sa <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_matched_sa[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_matched_sa[[i]] <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_matched_sa[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient*df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days + df_matched.zscore$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
  
  
  full_age_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall[, which(names(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore_fullcentall$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  full_age_reg_table_sa$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(full_age_reg_table_sa$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results full all sample (no other covariates): ", dim(full_age_reg_table_sa %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

## Thickness

###  simple linear regressions

#### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df_matched.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
swyc_matched_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ norm_devo_quotient, data = df_matched.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_matched_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_matched_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(swyc_matched_th %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_matched_th$label <- rownames(swyc_matched_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

swyc_matched_th_sig_MC <- swyc_matched_th %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC$swyc_beta)))
```

#### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- swyc_matched_th
name <- "swyc_matched_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

#### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(swyc_matched_th_noplot <- swyc_matched_th_sig_MC[!(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(swyc_matched_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = swyc_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "SWYC Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(swyc_matched_dkt_th_plot, "swyc_matched_median-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

#### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- swyc_matched_th_sig_MC[order(abs(swyc_matched_th_sig_MC$swyc_beta), decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_swyc_matched_th <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  print(i)
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  print(pheno)
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_swyc_matched_th)[i] <- pheno
  scatterplots_swyc_matched_th[[i]] <- ggplot(df_matched.zscore, aes(x = norm_devo_quotient, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "SWYC (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_swyc_matched_th[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```



### SWYC X age interaction

#### Regression and results
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$norm_devo_quotient*df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days + df_matched.zscore$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   swycbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], swycbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], swycbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swycbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th$swycbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant SWYC x Age IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))

range(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(swycbyage_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swycbyage_beta))

if(dim(swycbyage.qc_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1] > 0){
  age_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore[, which(names(df_matched.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  age_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(age_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results (no other covariates): ", dim(age_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
  
  
  full_age_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall[, which(names(df_matched.zscore_fullcentall) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df_matched.zscore_fullcentall$adjusted_age_in_days)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(age_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  full_age_reg_table_th$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(full_age_reg_table_th$age_p, method = "BH")
  print(paste0("Age Main significant results full all sample (no other covariates): ", dim(full_age_reg_table_th %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

## Test Mediation

### Brain covars with bw
```{r}
sum(!is.na(df_matched.zscore$birth_weight_kg))

lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg + th.cmd, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ birth_weight_kg + global_CortexVol, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol)
lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched_stats
lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd_stats
lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol_stats

#plot

df_plot_bw <- data.frame(
  model = c("no covar BW", "thickness cmd covar", "ctxvol covar"),
  estimate = c(summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"]),
  se = c(summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_matched)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
         summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
         summary(lm_swyc_matched_bw_ctxvol)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = estimate - se,
    ymax = estimate + se
  )

ggplot(df_plot_bw, aes(x = model, y = estimate)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_classic()

```

### Brain covars with bw
```{r}
sum(!is.na(df_matched.zscore$ga_days_total_qc))

lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ gestational_age, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ gestational_age + th.cmd, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol <- lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ gestational_age + global_CortexVol, data = df_matched.zscore)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol_stats <- summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol)
lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched_stats
lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd_stats
lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol_stats

#plot

df_plot_ga <- data.frame(
  model = c("no covar ga", "thickness cmd covar", "ctxvol covar"),
  estimate = c(summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"],
               summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol)$coefficients[2, "Estimate"]),
  se = c(summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_matched)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
         summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_thcmd)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
         summary(lm_swyc_matched_ga_ctxvol)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = estimate - se,
    ymax = estimate + se
  )

ggplot(df_plot_ga, aes(x = model, y = estimate)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_classic()

```


# LMSz Centiles

## Prep SWYC-LMSz centiles data

### merge and take z-scores of centiles
```{r}
lmsz_centiles$participant_id_modified <- sub("sub-", "", lmsz_centiles$participant_id)

swyc_lmsz <- merge(swyc_subset_avg %>% select(all_of(c("pat_id", "mean_dq", "median_dq", "preterm",
                                                   "birth_weight_kg","gestational_age", "bweight_percentile",
                                                   "sex", "adjusted_age_in_days", "median_euler_mean"))),
                   lmsz_centiles, by.x = c("pat_id", "sex"), by.y = c("participant_id_modified", "sex"), all.x = FALSE, all.y = FALSE)
#swyc_lmsz <- merge(swyc_lmsz, df.zscore %>% select(pat_id, grep("cmd", names(.))), 
                   #by = "pat_id", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)

table(swyc_lmsz$preterm)
# zscore centiles and other variables of interest
lmsz_vars <- names(swyc_lmsz)[grep(".lmsz", names(swyc_lmsz))]
df.zscore_lmsz <- swyc_lmsz %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, lmsz_vars, "bweight_percentile")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", 
                         #"adjusted_age_in_days", 
                         "age_at_scan",
                         "median_euler_mean", "mean_dq", "median_dq")), scale))
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore_lmsz$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore_lmsz$sex)
df.zscore_lmsz$preterm <- as.factor(df.zscore_lmsz$preterm)
```

### find Inf cells, make a table of N per phenotype, then convert to NaN
```{r, echo = FALSE}
inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)
```

## Global Variables

### Run regressions with original and lmsz centiles
```{r}
swyc_orig_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

global_vars_totest_lmsz <- paste0(global_vars_totest, ".lmsz")

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% global_vars_totest_lmsz)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")
```

### Calculate SE bars and combine into one df
```{r}
#orig centiles
swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_lower <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_upper <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_global$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_global <- swyc_orig_reg_table_global %>% mutate(type = "orig")

#lmsz centiles
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_lower <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_upper <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global <- swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global %>% mutate(type = "lmsz")

#combine tables
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global <- rbind(swyc_orig_reg_table_global, swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$type <- as.factor(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$type)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global$label <- rownames(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global) %>% sub(".lmsz", "", .)
```

### Plot betas from both models with SE bars
```{r}
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_global, aes(y = label, x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Phenotype", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")
```


## Volume Variables

### Run regressions with original and lmsz centiles
```{r}
swyc_orig_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")

vol_vars_lmsz <- paste0(vol_vars, ".lmsz")

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% vol_vars_lmsz)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_p, method = "BH")
```

### Calculate SE bars and combine into one df
```{r}
#orig centiles
swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_lower <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_upper <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_vol$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_vol <- swyc_orig_reg_table_vol %>% mutate(type = "orig")

#lmsz centiles
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_lower <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_upper <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol <- swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol %>% mutate(type = "lmsz")

#combine tables
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol <- rbind(swyc_orig_reg_table_vol, swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$type <- as.factor(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$type)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol$label <- rownames(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol) %>% sub(".lmsz", "", .)
```

### Plot betas from both models with SE bars
```{r}
# Right Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol %>% filter(grepl("aparc", label) & grepl("rh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_GrayVol_rh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Right Cortical Vol", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

#Left Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol %>% filter(grepl("aparc", label) & grepl("lh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_GrayVol_lh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Left Cortical Vol", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

#Subcortical
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_vol %>% filter(grepl("aseg", label)), aes(y = sub("aseg_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Subcortical Vol", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")


```

## Surface Area Variables

### Run regressions with original and lmsz centiles
```{r}
swyc_orig_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")

sa_vars_lmsz <- paste0(sa_vars, ".lmsz")

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% sa_vars_lmsz)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_p, method = "BH")
```

### Calculate SE bars and combine into one df
```{r}
#orig centiles
swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_lower <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_upper <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_sa$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_sa <- swyc_orig_reg_table_sa %>% mutate(type = "orig")

#lmsz centiles
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_lower <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_upper <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa <- swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa %>% mutate(type = "lmsz")

#combine tables
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa <- rbind(swyc_orig_reg_table_sa, swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$type <- as.factor(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$type)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa$label <- rownames(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa) %>% sub(".lmsz", "", .)
```

### Plot betas from both models with SE bars
```{r}
# Right Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa %>% filter(grepl("rh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_SurfArea_rh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Right Cortical SA", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

#Left Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_sa %>% filter(grepl("lh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_SurfArea_lh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Left Cortical SA", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

```

## Cortical Thickness Variables

### Run regressions with original and lmsz centiles
```{r}
swyc_orig_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")

th_vars_lmsz <- paste0(th_vars, ".lmsz")

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_lmsz[, which(names(df.zscore_lmsz) %in% th_vars_lmsz)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_lmsz$median_dq)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_p, method = "BH")
```

### Calculate SE bars and combine into one df
```{r}
#orig centiles
swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_lower <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_upper <- (swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_orig_reg_table_th$swyc_se)
swyc_orig_reg_table_th <- swyc_orig_reg_table_th %>% mutate(type = "orig")

#lmsz centiles
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_lower <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_beta - 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_upper <- (swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_beta + 1.96*swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$swyc_se)
swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th <- swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th %>% mutate(type = "lmsz")

#combine tables
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th <- rbind(swyc_orig_reg_table_th, swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$type <- as.factor(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$type)
comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th$label <- rownames(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th) %>% sub(".lmsz", "", .)
```

### Plot betas from both models with SE bars
```{r}
# Right Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th %>% filter(grepl("rh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_rh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Right Cortical Thick", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

#Left Hemisphere
ggplot(comb_swyc_lmsz_reg_table_th %>% filter(grepl("lh", label)), aes(y = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_lh_", "", label), x = swyc_beta, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = swyc_upper, xmax = swyc_lower),
                width = 0,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space labels
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),             # space title
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(), # x major grids visible
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), # y grids gone
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank() ) + # x minor grids gone
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orig" = "grey", "lmsz" = "#B56576")) +
  labs(x = "Beta Estimate", y = "Left Cortical Thick", color = "Centile Model") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")
```

# Look at SWYC trajectories

## Check proportions of preterm for each SWYC assessment
```{r}
swyc$preterm <- as.factor(cut(as.numeric(swyc$ga_days_total_qc_num), breaks = c(-Inf, 31.9, 36.9, Inf), labels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term"), include.lowest = TRUE))

swyc %>%
  count(form_friendly_name, preterm) %>%
  group_by(form_friendly_name) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = form_friendly_name, y = prop, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  ylab("Proportion") +
  xlab("Form") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Plot trajectories
```{r}
(swyc_trajectory_plot <- ggplot(swyc, aes(y = norm_devo_quotient, group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name),size = 0.1) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))
```

## Simple trajectory classification
```{r}
# subset for SWYC 2+
swyc_rm <- swyc %>%
   group_by(pat_id) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup()

# classify based on lm(dq ~ age)
swyc_lms <- swyc_rm %>%
  group_by(pat_id) %>%
  arrange(effective_age, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    lm_fit = list(lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ effective_age, data = cur_data())),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

swyc_lms_2plus <- swyc_lms %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    beta = coef(lm_fit)[["effective_age"]],
    classification = case_when(
      beta > 0 ~ "positive",
      beta < 0 ~ "negative",
      beta == 0 ~ "zero")
  ) %>%
  select(pat_id, beta, n_obs, classification)

swyc_trajplot_df <- merge(swyc, swyc_lms_2plus, by = "pat_id", all.x = FALSE)

(swyc_trajectory_plot1 <- ggplot(swyc_trajplot_df, aes(y = norm_devo_quotient, 
                                                      group = pat_id, color = classification)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age),size = 0.1) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))

swyc_lms_3plus <- swyc_lms %>%
  filter(n_obs > 2) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    beta = coef(lm_fit)[["effective_age"]],
    pval = summary(lm_fit)$coefficients["effective_age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    classification = case_when(
      pval < 0.05 & beta > 0 ~ "positive_significant",
      pval < 0.05 & beta < 0 ~ "negative_significant",
      TRUE ~ "not_significant"
  )) %>%
  select(pat_id, beta, pval, n_obs, classification)

swyc_trajplot_df2 <- merge(swyc, swyc_lms_3plus, by = "pat_id", all.x = FALSE)

(swyc_trajectory_plot2 <- ggplot(swyc_trajplot_df2, aes(y = norm_devo_quotient, 
                                                      group = pat_id, color = classification)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age),size = 0.1) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))

(swyc_trajectory_plot3 <- ggplot(swyc_trajplot_df2 %>% filter(classification != "not_significant"), aes(y = norm_devo_quotient, 
                                                      group = pat_id, color = classification)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age),size = 0.1) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))
```


### Compare betas based on GA/Preterm
```{r}
swyc_lms_2plus_test <- merge(swyc_lms_2plus, swyc %>% select(pat_id, gestational_age_num), all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
swyc_lms_2plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num <- as.numeric(swyc_lms_2plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num)

cor.test(~ beta + gestational_age_num, data = swyc_lms_2plus_test)

plot(swyc_lms_2plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, swyc_lms_2plus_test$beta)

swyc_lms_2plus_test$preterm <- as.factor(cut(swyc_lms_2plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, breaks = c(-Inf, 31.9, 36.9, Inf), labels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term"), include.lowest = TRUE))


# PLOTS
swyc_lms_2plus_summary <- swyc_lms_2plus_test %>% 
  filter(!is.na(preterm))%>%
  group_by(preterm) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_beta = mean(beta, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_beta = median(beta, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ggplot(swyc_lms_2plus_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  )) +
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms_2plus_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.01,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Beta of SWYC over time (2+ timepoints)")

ggplot(swyc_lms_2plus_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  ))  +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.0024, 0.0015)) + 
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms_2plus_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.002,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Beta of SWYC over time (2+ timepoints)")


# Stats Testing
anova_fit <- aov(beta ~ preterm, data = swyc_lms_2plus_test)
summary(anova_fit)

pairwise.t.test(swyc_lms_2plus_test$beta, swyc_lms_2plus_test$preterm, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
```

### Compare betas for significant traj based on GA/Preterm
```{r}
swyc_lms_3plus_test <- merge(swyc_lms_3plus %>% filter(classification != "not_significant"), swyc %>% select(pat_id, gestational_age_num), all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
swyc_lms_3plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num <- as.numeric(swyc_lms_3plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num)

cor.test(~ beta + gestational_age_num, data = swyc_lms_3plus_test)

plot(swyc_lms_3plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, swyc_lms_3plus_test$beta)

swyc_lms_3plus_test$preterm <- as.factor(cut(swyc_lms_3plus_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, breaks = c(-Inf, 31.9, 36.9, Inf), labels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term"), include.lowest = TRUE))

table(swyc_lms_3plus_test$preterm)

# PLOTS
swyc_lms_3plus_summary <- swyc_lms_3plus_test %>% 
  filter(!is.na(preterm))%>%
  group_by(preterm) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_beta = mean(beta, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_beta = median(beta, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ggplot(swyc_lms_3plus_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  )) +
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms_3plus_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.005,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Sig. Beta of SWYC over time (3+ timepoints)")

ggplot(swyc_lms_3plus_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  ))  +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.0045, 0.002)) + 
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms_3plus_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.0035,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Sig. Beta of SWYC over time (3+ timepoints)")


# Stats Testing
anova_fit <- aov(beta ~ preterm, data = swyc_lms_3plus_test)
summary(anova_fit)

pairwise.t.test(swyc_lms_3plus_test$beta, swyc_lms_3plus_test$preterm, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
```

## Simple trajectory classification - only 24mos and 30mos
```{r}
# subset for SWYC 2+
swyc_rm2430 <- swyc %>%
   filter(form_friendly_name %in% c("SWYC : 24 Month", "SWYC : 30 Month")) %>%
   group_by(pat_id) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup()

# classify based on lm(dq ~ age)
swyc_lms2430 <- swyc_rm2430 %>%
  group_by(pat_id) %>%
  arrange(effective_age, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    lm_fit = list(lm(norm_devo_quotient ~ effective_age, data = cur_data())),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

swyc_lms2430 <- swyc_lms2430 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    beta = coef(lm_fit)[["effective_age"]],
    classification = case_when(
      beta > 0 ~ "positive",
      beta < 0 ~ "negative",
      beta == 0 ~ "zero")
  ) %>%
  select(pat_id, beta, n_obs, classification)

swyc_trajplot2430_df <- merge(swyc_rm2430, swyc_lms2430, by = "pat_id", all.x = FALSE)

(swyc_trajectory2430_plot1 <- ggplot(swyc_trajplot2430_df, aes(y = norm_devo_quotient, 
                                                      group = pat_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = effective_age, color = form_friendly_name), size = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(x = effective_age, color = classification),size = 0.1) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()))
```


### Compare betas based on GA/Preterm
```{r}
swyc_lms2430_test <- merge(swyc_lms2430, swyc %>% select(pat_id, gestational_age_num), all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
swyc_lms2430_test$ga_days_total_qc_num <- as.numeric(swyc_lms2430_test$ga_days_total_qc_num)

cor.test(~ beta + gestational_age_num, data = swyc_lms2430_test)

plot(swyc_lms2430_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, swyc_lms2430_test$beta)

swyc_lms2430_test$preterm <- as.factor(cut(swyc_lms2430_test$ga_days_total_qc_num, breaks = c(-Inf, 31.9, 36.9, Inf), labels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term"), include.lowest = TRUE))


# PLOTS
swyc_lms2430_summary <- swyc_lms2430_test %>% 
  filter(!is.na(preterm))%>%
  group_by(preterm) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_beta = mean(beta, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_beta = median(beta, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ggplot(swyc_lms2430_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  )) +
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms2430_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.01,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Beta of SWYC over time (2+ timepoints)")

ggplot(swyc_lms2430_test %>% filter(!is.na(preterm)), aes(x = factor(preterm, levels = c("VPM", "LPM", "Term")), 
                                                            y = beta, fill = preterm)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "VPM" = "#C86A5D",   # muted red
    "LPM" = "#E1A159",   # muted orange
    "Term" = "#A59F8F"   # muted reddish-gray
  ))  +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.0024, 0.0015)) + 
  geom_text(data = swyc_lms2430_summary, aes(x = preterm,
                                   y = -0.002,
                                   label = paste0("Mean: ", signif(mean_beta,3), "\nMedian: ", signif(median_beta,3))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 1) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ylab("Beta of SWYC over time (2+ timepoints)")


# Stats Testing
anova_fit <- aov(beta ~ preterm, data = swyc_lms2430_test)
summary(anova_fit)

pairwise.t.test(swyc_lms2430_test$beta, swyc_lms2430_test$preterm, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
```

## which of the folks with trajectories have brain centile scores
```{r}
swyc_lms_2plus_brain <- merge(swyc_lms_2plus, centiles_all, by.x = "pat_id", by.y = "participant_id_modified", all.x = FALSE, all.y = FALSE)
swyc_lms_3plus_brain <- merge(swyc_lms_3plus, centiles_all, by.x = "pat_id", by.y = "participant_id_modified", all.x = FALSE, all.y = FALSE)
```

## check associations with global vars

### Define global vars of interest
```{r, echo = TRUE}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness")
```

### SWYC ~ global without QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(swyc_lms_3plus_brain[, which(names(swyc_lms_3plus_brain) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ swyc_lms_3plus_brain$beta)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

### SWYC ~ global with QC
```{r, echo = FALSE}
swyc.qc_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(swyc_lms_3plus_brain[, which(names(swyc_lms_3plus_brain) %in% global_vars_totest)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ swyc_lms_3plus_brain$beta + swyc_lms_3plus_brain$median_euler_mean)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(swyc_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], swyc_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], swyc_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p_adj <- p.adjust(swyc.qc_reg_table_global$swyc_p, method = "BH")

swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05)
range(swyc.qc_reg_table_global %>% filter(swyc_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(swyc_beta))
```

### plot against centile scores
```{r}
cor.test(~ qnorm(global_eTIV) + scale(beta), data = swyc_lms_3plus_brain)
ggplot(swyc_lms_3plus_brain, aes(x = global_eTIV, y = beta)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8F8F8F") +
  theme_minimal()
```


Ideas/what to do:
For SWYC-based analyses
- Take median up to date/age of SWYC
- Use median SWYC at first pass
- Look at association between env ~ swyc
- See if including env in regression between perinatal ~ swyc changes anything

For  Brain Centile-based analyses
- Take median up to date/age of scan
- Look at association between env ~ centile
- See if including env in regression between perinatal ~ centile changes anything
